positive: A mystical, symmetrical celestial jungle scene featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna. The composition should be centered and contained within a clear silhouette, designed for textile printing. Key elements include stylized, oversized cosmic ferns, geometrically patterned lunar moths, and luminous deep-blue and emerald-green crystalline vines. Style is highly detailed scientific illustration mixed with Art Nouveau influences, utilizing strong, flat color fields and thick outlines, reminiscent of stained glass or woodcut prints. The background should be a deep, velvety indigo void contrasted sharply with the vibrant, glowing subject matter. Perfect symmetry, high contrast, clean lines, maximalist detail, vector art aesthetic, printed on a single continuous field.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, photorealistic, watermark, text, signature, low detail, extra limbs, malformed anatomy, blurry edges, bokeh, grayscale, cartoonish, graffiti, logos, trademarks
